case_title: MARIO CAMPOS VS. FILLMORE GRILL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE GRILL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA LONG BAR & BISTRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, MARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILLMORE GRILL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA LONG BAR & BISTRO $7,350.46 PRINCIPAL, $38.55 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,614.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
